summary: P0 Bug Fix Verification - Console State Calibration Flow (Iteration 67). All 8 backend API tests pass. The fix ensures /api/console/state endpoint now writes to BOTH strategic_console_state and user_operator_profile.persona_calibration_status tables when status=COMPLETE. This fixes the old 9-step calibration questionnaire incorrectly appearing during new user signup flow.

frontend.homepage: PASS - Dark theme (#0F1720), BIQc branding visible
frontend.login_page: PASS - Email/password fields visible, OAuth buttons (Google, Microsoft)
frontend.calibration_redirect: PASS - /calibration redirects to /login-supabase for unauthenticated users

p0_bug_fix_verification.root_cause: /api/console/state was writing to wrong database fields (operator_profile.console_state) while /calibration/status reads from strategic_console_state.is_complete and user_operator_profile.persona_calibration_status
p0_bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: /api/console/state endpoint (routes/calibration.py lines 449-494) now writes to BOTH tables when status=COMPLETE
p0_bug_fix_verification.verification_method: Created temporary test user, called console/state with COMPLETE, verified calibration/status returns COMPLETE and onboarding/status returns completed=true

critical_code_review_comments: Fix in routes/calibration.py lines 467-489: When status=COMPLETE, now sets persona_calibration_status='complete' AND upserts strategic_console_state with is_complete=True
Frontend fix in useCalibrationState.js line 111: triggerComplete now uses 'session' variable from hook instead of undefined 'supabase' reference

test_credentials.temp_test_users: Created and cleaned up automatically during tests

seed_data_creation: Temporary test users created via Supabase admin API and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fix for calibration flow is verified. The /api/console/state endpoint now correctly writes to both strategic_console_state and user_operator_profile tables when status=COMPLETE, ensuring new user signup flow doesn't show old 9-step calibration. All 8 backend tests pass including the critical test_console_state_complete_marks_both_tables which creates a fresh user and verifies the complete flow.
